backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining EnrollmentApplication and StudentQuestion types with functions to submit and query applications and questions, storing them in lists with timestamps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the search-and-replace task to change all instances of 'COBAD 35' to 'COBAT 35' across frontend components and HTML files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing components with burgundy color scheme and COBAT 35 branding throughout the application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining burgundy and white color palette for light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'COBAT 35 Website' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering all sections in order: HeroSection, AboutSection, LocationMap, EnrollmentForm, QuestionsForm, ContactButtons, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Section showcasing four benefits of COBAT 35 (academic excellence, collaborative environment, modern facilities, proven success) using burgundy-themed cards with icons and images.
frontend/src/components/ContactButtons.t: Fixed floating buttons for WhatsApp and Instagram contact, but still references 'COBAD 35' in the WhatsApp message text instead of 'COBAT 35'.
frontend/src/components/EnrollmentForm.t: Enrollment form with validation collecting student information (name, email, phone, DOB, previous school, grade level) and displaying success message mentioning COBAT 35.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with burgundy background displaying COBAT 35 branding, contact information, hours, student credit for Omar García Arias, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with burgundy gradient overlay, white text displaying 'COBAT 35' heading, tagline 'Construyendo el Futuro de México', and call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/components/LocationMap.tsx: Displays an embedded Google Maps iframe showing the location of COBAT 35 de Gómez Farías with a link to open in Google Maps. Includes a header with MapPin icon and styled with burgundy theme colors.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsForm.ts: A form component for submitting questions with fields for name, email, phone, and question text. Shows a success message with school branding after submission and includes form validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient. Manages authentication state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting and fetching applications and questions data through the backend actor. Includes mutations for submissions and queries for retrieving data lists.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a burgundy/white color scheme for both light and dark modes. Includes base styles for smooth scrolling and font features.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom burgundy color palette using OKLCH color space, extended font families (Inter, Poppins), container settings, and custom animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking features, architectural notes, and known issues for a COBAD 35 school website with enrollment forms, WhatsApp/Instagram integration, and Google Maps. Contains a known issue where some text still shows 'COBAD 35' instead of 'COBAT 35'.
